title: Transfer Pricing Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing intercompany transfer prices based on cost, market, and regulatory constraints, incorporating lean and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Production Cost per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Direct manufacturing cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct manufacturing cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici işletmede birim başına doğrudan üretim maliyeti (malzeme, işçilik, genel gider).
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Fertigungskosten pro Einheit (Material, Arbeit, Gemeinkosten) beim produzierenden Unternehmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de fabrication direct par unité (matériaux, main-d'œuvre, frais généraux) chez l'entité productrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste directo de fabricación por unidad (materiales, mano de obra, gastos generales) en la entidad productora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة التصنيع المباشرة لكل وحدة (مواد، عمالة، تكاليف عامة) في الكيان المنتج.

inputs.label: Market Price per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Arm's length market price for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Arm's length market price for comparable uncontrolled transactions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılaştırılabilir kontrolsüz işlemler için geçerli piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de marché de pleine concurrence pour des transactions comparables non contrôlées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de mercado en condiciones de plena competencia para transacciones no controladas comparables.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر السوق على أساس ذراع الطول للمعاملات غير الخاضعة للرقابة المماثلة.

inputs.label: Transaction Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units transferred between entities in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units transferred between entities in the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem içinde işletmeler arasında transfer edilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zwischen den Unternehmen übertragenen Einheiten im Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités transférées entre entités sur la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades transferidas entre entidades en el período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المنقولة بين الكيانات في الفترة.

inputs.label: Producer Entity Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate of the producing entity's jurisdiction.

label_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva de la entidad productora (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate of the producing entity's jurisdiction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici işletmenin bulunduğu ülkedeki efektif kurumlar vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Körperschaftsteuersatz der Gerichtsbarkeit des produzierenden Unternehmens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux effectif d'impôt sur les sociétés de la juridiction de l'entité productrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa efectiva del impuesto de sociedades de la jurisdicción de la entidad productora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضريبة الشركات الفعلي للولاية القضائية للكيان المنتج.

inputs.label: Distributor Entity Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate of the distributing entity's jurisdiction.

label_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva de la entidad distribuidora (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate of the distributing entity's jurisdiction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dağıtıcı işletmenin bulunduğu ülkedeki efektif kurumlar vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Körperschaftsteuersatz der Gerichtsbarkeit des vertreibenden Unternehmens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux effectif d'impôt sur les sociétés de la juridiction de l'entité distributrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa efectiva del impuesto de sociedades de la jurisdicción de la entidad distribuidora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضريبة الشركات الفعلي للولاية القضائية للكيان الموزع.

inputs.label: Current Transfer Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Existing transfer price used for intercompany transactions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Existing transfer price used for intercompany transactions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketler arası işlemlerde kullanılan mevcut transfer fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de transfert existant utilisé pour les transactions interentreprises.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de transferencia existente utilizado para transacciones entre compañías.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر التحويل الحالي المستخدم للمعاملات بين الشركات.

inputs.label: Compliance Risk Tolerance (Low/Medium/High)
inputs.businessContext: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's length range, High = wider range.

businessContext_i18n.en: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's length range, High = wider range.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketin denetim riskine karşı toleransı; Düşük = dar emsallere uygunluk aralığı, Yüksek = geniş aralık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Risikobereitschaft des Unternehmens in Bezug auf Prüfungsrisiken; Niedrig = enger Fremdvergleichsbereich, Hoch = weiterer Bereich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Appétit de l'entreprise pour le risque de contrôle ; Faible = fourchette de pleine concurrence serrée, Élevé = fourchette plus large.
businessContext_i18n.es: Apetito de la empresa por el riesgo de auditoría; Bajo = rango de plena competencia ajustado, Alto = rango más amplio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رغبة الشركة في تحمل مخاطر التدقيق؛ منخفض = نطاق ذراع ضيق، مرتفع = نطاق أوسع.

inputs.label: Include Lean Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a waste reduction factor (muda) to production cost based on Six Sigma process capability.

label_i18n.fr: Inclure le facteur de gaspillage Lean

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a waste reduction factor (muda) to production cost based on Six Sigma process capability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, Altı Sigma proses yeteneğine göre üretim maliyetine bir israf azaltma faktörü (muda) uygulanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wird ein Verschwendungsreduktionsfaktor (Muda) auf die Produktionskosten basierend auf der Six-Sigma-Prozessfähigkeit angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de réduction des déchets (muda) au coût de production basé sur la capabilité Six Sigma du procédé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica un factor de reducción de desperdicio (muda) al coste de producción basado en la capacidad del proceso Seis Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق عامل تقليل الهدر (مودا) على تكلفة الإنتاج بناءً على قدرة عملية ستة سيجما.

rules.message: Production cost must be less than market price for positive margin.
Current transfer price should be between production cost and market price.
Transaction volume must be greater than zero.
Low risk tolerance requires the arm's length range to be within 15% of market price.

thresholds.alert: Distributor margin below 10% – potential profit shifting red flag.
Tax savings exceed 5% of revenue – may attract regulatory scrutiny.
Lean waste factor adjustment exceeds $5/unit – consider process improvement.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
